center.name: 斯特拉斯堡
center.summary: 斯特拉斯堡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Nanday parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nanday parakeet (Aratinga nenday), also known as the black-hooded parakeet or nanday conure, is a medium-small, mostly green, Neotropical parrot native to continental South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nanday parakeet (Aratinga nenday), also known as the black-hooded parakeet or nanday conure, is a medium-small, mostly green, Neotropical parrot native to continental South America
